body.sql: SELECT `service`, COUNT(`events_total`) AS `_value_`, (CAST((FLOOR(dtEventTimeStamp + 0) / 60000) AS INT) * 60000 - 0) AS `_timestamp_` FROM (SELECT `service`, `events_total`, `dtEventTimeStamp` FROM `golden_doris_no_shard_history`.doris WHERE `dtEventTimeStamp` >= 1784701739999 AND `dtEventTimeStamp` <= 1784702135999 AND `dtEventTime` >= '2026-07-22 14:28:59' AND `dtEventTime` <= '2026-07-22 14:35:36' AND `thedate` = '20260722' AND `status` = 'failed' UNION ALL SELECT `service`, `events_total`, `dtEventTimeStamp` FROM `golden_doris_no_shard_current`.doris WHERE `dtEventTimeStamp` >= 1784701739999 AND `dtEventTimeStamp` <= 1784702135999 AND `dtEventTime` >= '2026-07-22 14:28:59' AND `dtEventTime` <= '2026-07-22 14:35:36' AND `thedate` = '20260722' AND `status` = 'failed') AS combined_data GROUP BY `service`, _timestamp_ ORDER BY `_timestamp_` ASC LIMIT 2000005
